summary: ANDROID 🟥 DFU flow can proceed on Software Update page even though device was disconnected
scenario: User is incorrectly navigated to Three Easy Steps page instead of seeing an error message when headset disconnects during DFU flow on Software Update page
description_clean: After entering the DFU flow and navigating to the Software Update page, if the headset is disconnected and the user tries to continue, they are incorrectly navigated to the Three Easy Steps page instead of being shown an error message: "Update currently not available, please try back later." The severity is Minor because the user is ultimately prevented from completing the DFU flow when the device is disconnected mid-flow.
steps: Navigate to the Software Update page
expected: User is shown an error message: "Update currently not available, please try back later."
actual: User is incorrectly navigated to the Three Easy Steps page.
